tasks.title: Clarify nginx -t, reload vs restart
tasks.body: Figure out what `nginx -t` actually validates, and lock in when to use reload vs restart.

tasks.title: SSH key deploy checklist (authorized_keys + perms)
tasks.body: Copy pubkey to authorized_keys, then verify permissions so auth does not silently fail: home/`.ssh` 700, keys 600.

tasks.title: UFW: open 80/443 without locking out SSH
tasks.body: Allow 80/443, keep 22 open, then enable ufw so you do not lock yourself out.

tasks.title: Certbot nginx cert + renewal timer check
tasks.body: `certbot certonly --nginx -d example.com`. Renewal is a cron/timer — verify with `systemctl list-timers | grep cert`.

tasks.title: Postgres dump/restore with custom format
tasks.body: Dump with `pg_dump -Fc`, restore with `pg_restore -d ...`. Avoid plain SQL for big databases.

tasks.title: Clean up dead Docker containers (careful with volumes)
tasks.body: `docker ps -a | grep dead`, then prune only if you are sure volumes are safe.

tasks.title: Pick one Node version manager (asdf / nvm / mise)
tasks.body: Choose asdf, nvm, or mise for Node on the laptop; stop installing Node globally with brew every time.

tasks.title: Relearn Docker EXPOSE vs publish (-p)
tasks.body: Clarify difference between Dockerfile `EXPOSE` and publishing ports with `-p`.

reference.title: YouTube link (metadata placeholder)
reference.body: https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ — kept from dump; enrich title/about in Phase 1 if needed.

reference.title: tmux quick keys
reference.body: Ctrl-b d detach, Ctrl-b c new window, Ctrl-b % split.

reference.title: compose depends_on ≠ healthy
reference.body: `depends_on` does not wait for healthy unless you set a health condition.

articleCandidates.title: Permissions that look fine but break SSH/nginx
articleCandidates.why: Explicit article idea in notes: 700 home, 700 .ssh, 600 keys, plus SELinux/AppArmor footnote — pairs with the SSH checklist task.
